fields.description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.

SENIOR CUSTOMER MARKETING MANAGER




This position requires a hybrid work schedule with regular in-person attendance at our Menlo Park or New York City office.


WHO WE ARE

Snowflake delivers the AI Data Cloud, a global network where thousands of organizations mobilize data with near-unlimited scale, concurrency, and performance. Inside the AI Data Cloud, organizations unite their siloed data, easily discover and securely share governed data, and execute diverse analytic workloads. Wherever data or users live, Snowflake delivers a single and seamless experience across multiple public clouds. Snowflake’s platform is the engine that powers and provides access to the AI Data Cloud, creating a solution for data warehousing, data lakes, data engineering, data science, data application development, and data sharing. Join Snowflake customers, partners, and data providers already taking their businesses to new frontiers in the AI Data Cloud. snowflake.com


http://snowflake.comWHO YOU ARE
Snowflake is seeking a strategic, customer-obsessed Senior Manager, Customer Marketing to join our Brand Marketing organization. This role will focus on developing and executing customer marketing strategies aligned to Snowflake’s product categories, working closely with Product Marketing, Product, Sales, and GTM teams.

You are passionate about customer storytelling and thrive in ambiguity. You know how to identify the right customer voices, build trust with senior stakeholders, and translate technical outcomes into compelling narratives. You’re comfortable leading high-touch engagements with Snowflake’s most strategic customers and influencing internal teams at all levels.

This role reports to the Director of Customer Marketing and partners closely with teams across Marketing, Sales, and Product.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Put the customer first by building trusted, long-term relationships with Snowflake’s top customers and telling their stories in ways that create mutual value

 - Own customer marketing initiatives aligned to key product categories, supporting priority launches, GTM motions, and strategic narratives

 - Execute high-touch customer marketing campaigns with Snowflake’s most strategic and visible customers, including executive-level engagements

 - Partner with Product Marketing, Product, Sales, Demand Generation, and Partner teams to identify strong customer champions and reference opportunities

 - Serve as a trusted advisor to cross-functional stakeholders on how to leverage customer stories for maximum impact

 - Develop and scale customer advocacy content, including case studies, videos, testimonials, webinars, blogs, event activations, and speaker engagements

 - Support customer storytelling needs for major events, webinars, and conferences, from sourcing speakers to speaker prep and execution

 - Strategically recruit, nurture, and manage customer advocates, maintaining an ongoing communication and engagement cadence

 - Track, analyze, and report on the performance of customer marketing campaigns and programs

 - Stay current on customer marketing best practices and evolving product narratives to continuously improve how we show up in market



WHAT YOU’LL HAVE

 - A customer-centric mindset with a strong bias toward action and ownership

 - Proven ability to manage multiple complex initiatives simultaneously in a fast-moving environment

 - Strong understanding of the customer lifecycle and the role customer marketing plays across acquisition, expansion, and retention

 - Technical curiosity and comfort learning new products and use cases, with the ability to collaborate effectively with Product and Product Marketing teams

 - Demonstrated experience building relationships with enterprise customers, from practitioners to executive leaders

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with strong storytelling instincts

 - Highly organized, self-directed, and effective in cross-functional environments

 - Strong project management skills and attention to detail



PREFERRED SKILLS AND EDUCATION

 - 8+ years of experience in customer marketing, product marketing, executive programs, or related B2B marketing roles

 - Experience running high-touch customer or executive marketing programs

 - Background in B2B SaaS or enterprise technology environments

 - Ability to influence senior stakeholders with confidence and credibility

 - Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field

 - Experience with Google Suite, Salesforce, Tableau, and Wrike



LET’S DO THIS!

The Snowflake Customer Marketing team is a small, tight-knit, dynamic group who are responsible for building and maintaining customer relationships to drive retention, loyalty, and advocacy. We’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake. If you want to play a part in building a global iconic brand that puts customers first, we want to hear from you!


Every Snowflake employee is expected to follow the company’s confidentiality and security standards for handling sensitive data. Snowflake employees must abide by the company’s data security plan as an essential part of their duties. It is every employee’s duty to keep customer information secure and confidential.

Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.

How do you want to make your impact?

For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com http://careers.snowflake.com
fields.title: Senior Customer Marketing Manager
